name: rush-plugin
description: Rush 平台 Claude Code 插件集合 — 覆盖 skill 发现发布、项目创建交接等全流程能力。

plugins.name: rush-skills
plugins.description: Discover, install, and publish Rush skills through reskill. Search the Rush registry with natural-language intent and publish new skills with sensible defaults.

plugins.name: rush-create
plugins.description: Hand off new-project creation to the Rush platform via rush-ai, then clone the generated repo to local so you can keep iterating.
